title: The Pall Mall Process declaration: tackling proliferation and irresponsible use of commercial cyber intrusion capabilities
body: "The Declaration launches the Pall Mall Process. This brings together international partners and stakeholders for an ongoing and globally inclusive dialogue to address the proliferation and irresponsible use of commercial cyber intrusion tools and services.  This Process builds on the whole-of-society approach to cyberspace. It acknowledges the importance of public-private partnership and multi-stakeholder collaboration for a more secure cyberspace.   Read the related joint communiqué from the UK and France.  "
